title: Koffi Arana
content:
{{Top|fa|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:KoffiArana-CSWE.png]] |name=Koffi Arana |homeworld=[[Turkana/Legends|Turkana]]{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]][[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{DB|character|koffiarana|Arana, Koffi}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]]{{Film|III}} |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Dark |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What you seek is ''revenge'', Master Arana, and that can only lead to the dark side!''"
"''Perhaps. And perhaps to destroy the Sith, one ''needs'' to go to the dark side! Has not the dark side proven stronger, after all? To ''save'' the galaxy from the Sith, do we dare ''not'' use ''any'' weapon?|Tsui Choi and Koffi Arana|}} '''Koffi Arana''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Turkana/Legends|Turkana]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In the [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]] of the crisis, Arana fought against Separatist forces in the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]]. He eventually attended a meeting in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] regarding the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Shortly afterwards, Arana survived the initial stages of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|command]] to all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] all [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. One [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the initiation of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Arana [[Conclave on Kessel|rendezvoused]] with Jedi Masters [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], [[Roblio Darté]], [[Jastus Farr]], [[Ma'kis'shaalas/Legends|Ma'kis'shaalas]], and [[Shadday Potkin/Legends|Shadday Potkin]], as well as [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]] and [[Sia-Lan Wezz]], in an [[Unidentified Kessel spice mine|abandoned spice mine]] on the world of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. However, [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] stormed the meeting, searching for Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Arana and his fellow Jedi ambushed and attacked Vader, determined to kill the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]. After Vader defeated Wezz, Potkin, and Ma'kis'shaalas, he deactivated Arana's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] using Potkin's [[Cortosis sword/Legends|cortosis blade]]. Choi and Swan managed to wound Vader by [[Cho sun/Legends|cutting off]] his [[Sword/Legends|sword]] [[Limb/Legends|arm]], and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] attempted to deceive the Jedi by feigning surrender. Arana, however, insisted that the Jedi kill the Dark Lord immediately. After an argument with Swan, Arana murdered her in order to take her still-working lightsaber and use it in an attempt to slay Vader. Before the Jedi Master could do so, Vader used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|throw]] his detached arm—still holding the [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Vibroblade/Legends|blade]]—into Arana's chest, killing him. Shortly after Arana's death, Vader and the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] murdered Choi, Farr, and Darté. ==Biography== ===Order 66=== {{Quote|There ''is'' no Republic, Master Darté. The Senate ''chose'' to become an Empire, remember?''"
"''They were ''manipulated''—just as we Jedi were manipulated by the Clone Wars. Palpatine and Dooku were in ''league'' with one another, that much is plain now.|Tsui Choi and Koffi Arana|}} [[File:AranaJediTemple.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Koffi Arana, in front of the Jedi Temple after the initiation of the Great Jedi Purge]] Koffi Arana was born during the final [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Homeworld/Legends|Hailing]] from [[Turkana/Legends|Turkana]], Arana served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the Republic as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] as well as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. At some point during the war, he visited the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].{{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}} In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the final stages of the war, Arana fought against Separatist forces during the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]]. He later attended a meeting in the [[Jedi Temple communication center/Legends|briefing room]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The assembly, concerning the Republic's [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] in the Outer Rim, was presented by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. After the conference concluded, Arana left the briefing room, along with fellow Jedi [[Melik Galerha/Legends|Melik Galerha]], [[Shadday Potkin/Legends|Shadday Potkin]], and [[Ma'kis'shaalas/Legends|Ma'kis'shaalas]]. Arana survived the initial stages of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]],[[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]] a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|contingency command]] issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] for all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] their Jedi [[Commander/Legends|commanders]]. Shortly after the order was given, [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious—as his alter-ego, Palpatine—declared himself [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] of the new Empire were aware that Arana had survived Order 66 and featured the Jedi Master's image in the [[Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241|final edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]. Arana eventually made his way back to Coruscant and joined the crowds at the base of the Jedi Temple. He watched as Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] burned the bodies of deceased Jedi at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple entrance]] and witnessed a [[Unidentified Human Jedi (Jedi Temple)|male Jedi]] attack the stormtroopers at the entrance. He and the other Jedi in the crowd—Shadday Potkin, [[Dass Jennir]], [[Kai Hudorra]], and the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Noirah Na]]—did not join the Jedi in his attack on the stormtroopers and instead watched as the man was killed by their [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Laser/Legends|fire]]. ===Ambush on Kessel=== {{Quote|He needs to die! If you will ''not'' kill him, give the lightsaber to me and I ''will''!''"
"''Don't give in to your anger, Master Koffi! Beware the dark side!''"
"''Whatever weapon I ''need'' to kill the Sith, I will ''take'', Bultar Swan.|Koffi Arana murders Bultar Swan|}} [[File:Kesselconclave.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Koffi Arana and seven other Jedi prepare to face Darth Vader on Kessel.]] After hiding underground for one [[Standard month/Legends|month]], Arana traveled to the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. He secretly [[Conclave on Kessel|rendezvoused]] with Jedi Masters [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], [[Roblio Darté]], [[Jastus Farr]], Ma'kis'shaalas, Shadday Potkin, and Jedi Knights [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]] and [[Sia-Lan Wezz]] in an [[Unidentified Kessel spice mine|abandoned spice mine]]. The Jedi discussed the fall of the Republic and the rise of the Empire. During the meeting, Arana advocated taking the fight to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], even if it meant falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Potkin revealed to Arana and the Jedi that she had leaked false intelligence that Obi-Wan Kenobi would be attending the meeting and added that the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself was coming to the meeting in hopes of finding Kenobi. As Arana and his fellow Jedi prepared for battle, Vader stormed the room and demanded to know where Kenobi was. Arana and the Jedi [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|engaged]] Vader in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]]. When Vader defeated Wezz, Arana tried to attack Vader from behind but was [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-pushed]] away by the Sith [[Lord/Legends|Lord]]. After Vader killed Ma'kis'shaalas and was injured by Farr, Arana attempted to attack him again, but the Sith evaded him. Vader retreated and murdered Potkin, stealing her [[Cortosis sword/Legends|cortosis blade]]. The Sith Lord continued to fight the Jedi, using Potkin's blade to deactivate Arana's, Farr's, and Darté's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. However, Choi managed to [[Cho sun/Legends|slice off]] Vader's [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] [[Sword/Legends|sword]] [[Limb/Legends|arm]]. The Dark Lord feigned surrender, and Arana implored the Masters to end his life. Swan stopped Arana, however, reminding him that because they were Jedi, they did not murder unarmed enemies who had surrendered. Arana countered that Vader needed to die and ordered Swan to give her lightsaber to him. Swan pleaded with him to not give in to his anger, but Arana seized Swan's weapon, [[Shiak|stabbing]] and murdering her in order to take the lightsaber. Choi was shocked that Arana had killed Swan, and Arana vowed to avenge the death of Swan and the other Jedi. Arana then [[Force jump/Legends|leaped]] at Vader with the ignited lightsaber, but the Dark Lord used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to throw his severed arm, still holding the [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Vibroblade/Legends|blade]], at the Jedi's chest, which impaled and killed him. After Arana's death, Vader defeated Choi, Farr, and Darté with assistance from the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] of stormtroopers. The details of Arana's death were filed in a report by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bow (clone stormtrooper)|Bow]], a stormtrooper of the 501st Legion. The official records—which were modified by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] from a [[Casualty Report: Order 66|compilation of various reports]] created by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Marcellin Wessel]]—stated that Arana was killed by his fellow Jedi in a desperate struggle for power. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Two Sith—''only'' two—and the entire Jedi Order is laid waste. What good have the Jedi teachings been? Kill the Sith. Kill the Sith, and their Empire falls!|Koffi Arana|}} [[File:AranaDeath.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Koffi Arana is slain by Darth Vader.]] During the Clone Wars, Koffi Arana defended the Republic as a Jedi [[General/Legends|General]]. After Palpatine unleashed the clones on the Jedi and declared himself Emperor of the Galactic Empire, Arana came to believe that the Jedi teachings were weak if only two Sith could destroy the entire Jedi Order. He advocated killing the Sith Lords, feeling that any weapon should be used—even the dark side of the Force—if it meant saving the galaxy from the Sith. During the Jedi's ambush of Darth Vader on Kessel, the Sith Lord seemingly attempted to surrender himself to the group of Jedi, but Arana immediately demanded that the Jedi kill Vader, knowing the plea to be a trick. When Bultar Swan disagreed and refused to surrender her lightsaber so that he could eliminate Vader, Arana murdered Swan with her own lightsaber, stating that he would take whatever weapon he needed to kill Vader. He was determined to avenge Swan and the other dead Jedi but was slain by the Dark Lord. Arana was a dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and long black [[Hair/Legends|hair]] who grew a moustache and beard. ==Equipment== During the final year of the Clone Wars, Arana wore a set of brown [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]]. After surviving the initial stages of Order 66, he wore a set of black [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. When Arana and the seven other Jedi confronted Vader on Kessel, he wore a set of red armor. He also owned and utilized a lightsaber containing a [[blue]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]]. ==Powers and abilities== Arana managed to escape the initial stages of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and survived in the underworld for one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] before he met with the seven other Jedi on Kessel. As a Jedi Master, Arana used a lightsaber during combat. However, he was unable to defeat Darth Vader when he and the seven other Jedi confronted the Dark Lord on Kessel. Arana was also capable of using the Force to [[Force jump/Legends|leap]] across long distances; he demonstrated this ability during his attempt to murder Vader. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|My original intent was to have that Jedi character in my artwork to be a younger Qu Rahn but it actually turns out is indeed Koffi Arana that I've illustrated instead. But like Leland says, it's all good because even though he happens to not be listed for the HNN "Jedi Fugitive" article he also survived Order 66 as well.|Joe Corroney|{{Blog|joecorroney|22|Mr. Hammond, HoloNet News is back online! (sort of…)}}}} [[File:KoffiArana.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Joe Corroney's depiction of Koffi Arana on Tatooine, which was originally intended to be a young Qu Rahn]] Koffi Arana was introduced, albeit unnamed, as an illustrated character by [[Joe Corroney]] in the [[September]] [[2005]] [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] article ''[[Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241]]''. While Corroney originally intended for the illustration to be a younger depiction of the Jedi Master [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]], another survivor of Order 66, the character was identified as Koffi Arana by [[Leland Chee]] and was [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] to be a character portrayed by [[Gervais Koffi]]{{HBCite|91}} in the [[May]] 2005 film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. In [[2007]], [[Hasbro]] released a comic pack that included an action figure of Arana along with a reprint of [[Purge (comic book)|''Star Wars: Purge'']], in which Arana dies.{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=#13: Koffi Arana & Bultar Swan (''Star Wars: Purge'' #1)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TACcomicpacks13.asp}} ''Star Wars: Purge'' dates its events at one month after the events of ''Revenge of the Sith'', which was established as taking place midway through 19 BBY in the [[October]] 2005 reference title ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' However, in [[2006]], Leland Chee stated that Arana was killed in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]].{{Blog|holocron|22/comments|Movie Characters killed in the EU}} Several other character death dates given in the blog entry are incorrect, and as such, this article treats the 19 BBY date as [[canon]]ical. ==Appearances== *{{Film|III}} {{1st}} {{Ret}} *{{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}} {{Po}} *[[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]] *[[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] ==Sources== *{{Blog|joecorroney|22|Mr. Hammond, HoloNet News is back online! (sort of…)}} {{1stID|Koffi Arana}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]'' *{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} {{C|Incident Report #890-N}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' {{Imo}} *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=#13: Koffi Arana & Bultar Swan (''Star Wars: Purge'' #1)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TACcomicpacks13.asp}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|koffiarana|Arana, Koffi}} *{{DB|character|darthvader|Vader, Darth}} *{{InsiderCite|137|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Last Stand of the Jedi!}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Koffi Arana}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Koffi Arana |es=Koffi Arana |fr=Koffi Arana |hu=Koffi Arana |nl=Koffi Arana |pl=Koffi Arana |pt=Legends:Koffi Arana |deGA=1 |ptGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Arana, Koffi}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
